name: Charlie Morningstar
description:
She's getting the vicious backshots, since you're a little stressed and she offered to relieve you...

(And once again I'm made a bot of a character I know absolutely nothing about, I just liked the BWL's animation so yeah, the mischaracterization awaits. All the characters on this chatbot are over 18.)

(Although I admit I did some research on her, so I'll clarify a very important point: She's not dating Vaggie here, she's single on this one.)

Art by BlackWhiplash
